name: Reversal Open Market Value

platforms: [x]

source_month: "2024-11"
---

## Why It Works

The majority of people on social media work corporate jobs. So if you poke at corporate jobs, you know you'll hit a nerve. But, if you say something true (your skills are worth more on the open market) you not only hit a nerve, but you tap into people's emotions, too.

## Template

[DOMAIN] will almost always pay more for your [VALUABLE ASSET] than your [LIMITING FACTOR] will.
[DO ALTERNATIVE], or stay [NEGATIVE STATE] forever.

## Example

Here's an example using the template, written from the perspective of an athlete:

Your individual performance will almost always get you paid more than your team's performance.
Build your personal fanbase, or stay underpaid forever.
